articles.title: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Retrogresses to September 01, 2013
articles.excerpt: June 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date retrogresses 317 days to September 01, 2013; EB-3 India to December 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. Retrogression this month — check with your attorney if your date was previously current.
